steps.t: Ancient dwarf remains can be found in Máttugard. You should collect dwarf remains for Belg Thickshanks.
Grámi's forge can be found at the Noble Gate in Máttugard. You should add the dwarf remains to the forge for Belg Thickshanks.
Belg Thickshanks can be found at the Noble Gate in Máttugard. You should talk to Belg Thickshanks.
